creator: thomas.dreibholz@gmail.com
text: The C and CXX standards are indeed unnecessary in the CMakeLists.txt. There are no relevant compilers not supporting at least the 2011 standard now, and RSPLIB builds with current versions as well. Version 3.4.9 has an updated CMakeLists.txt, and the updated Makefile does not request c++11 any more.
